ItacPersonItem.Notes: This Lamberto Monticoli is probably the same somaschan father who published works on rhetoric and taught the same subject in the Venice and Rome. He joined the Ricovrati in 1648.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
